title: Source Ingestion, Parsing, OCR, Provenance, and Trust · Failure Triage
summary: A preserved trace contains a plausible provenance-preserving ingestion ledger with one ingestion, normalization, chunking, lexical, embedding, index, filter, fusion, reranking, context, generation, citation, authorization, latency, or recovery defect; identify the first failed stage before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in provenance-preserving ingestion ledger and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explic…
objectives: Inventory source owner, authority, location, version, time, license, access policy, checksum, parser, and lineage for every ingested document.
Parse HTML, Markdown, PDF, office, JSON, email, and plain text through format-specific admission, size, recursion, and error contracts.
Retain page, region, reading order, table, figure, coordinate, OCR confidence, and source-image links when extraction needs layout evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

steps.title: RAG and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Rag Ingestion Quarantine Trust
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: rag-ingestion-quarantine-trust-1inujb" that uses case 6550 to admit parsed content with identity, provenance, licensing, quarantine, and untrusted-data boundaries. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import third-party packages, load models, open files or sockets, contact vector databases or provider APIs, read credentials or host state, execute commands, or cause external effects; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, pinned native packages, evaluated models, disposable data and indexes, controlled services, load, fault, recovery, security, accessibility, and production gates.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Rag Ingestion Quarantine Trust.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Rag Ingestion Quarantine Trust into observable performance evidence. For RAG and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Rag Ingestion Quarantine Trust, keep Rag Ingestion Quarantine Trust connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-ingestion-quarantine-trust-1inujb
# Competency: rag-ingestion-quarantine-trust.
# Case 6550: a public-benefits policy change.
# Operating constraint: measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score.
# Changed case: move the only supporting passage to the middle of the context and rerun the position slice.
def evidence_rag_ingestion_quarantine_trust_1inujb(source_id: str = "manual-v3", bytes_read: int = 4096, parse_errors: int = 0, licensed: bool = True, provenance_kept: bool = True, content_trusted: bool = False) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1inujb = "1inujb-bjuni1-6550"
    assert evidence_variant_1inujb
    evidence_axes_1inujb = (
        "corpus1inujb",
        "querybjuni1",
        "tenant6550",
        "index1inujb6550",
        "promptbjuni16550",
        "evaluation65501inujb",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1inujb)) == 6
    if not source_id or bytes_read < 0:
        return False, bytes_read, "source-admission"
    if parse_errors > 0:
        return False, parse_errors, "parse-quarantine"
    if not licensed or not provenance_kept:
        return False, bytes_read, "provenance-policy"
    if content_trusted:
        return False, bytes_read, "data-is-not-instruction"
    assert source_id == "manual-v3"
    return True, bytes_read, "quarantined-source"
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
